message:
feat: move compaction from SessionController into agent loop

Compaction previously lived in SessionController, which maintained a
shadow copy of the agent's history. When compaction triggered, it
compacted the shadow while the running agent kept its own history
untouched -- causing the agent to hit the context wall while the
controller thought it had compacted.

Now compaction runs inside the agent loop, right after plan_end when
we have fresh usage.input_tokens. The agent checks shouldCompact()
and also honors a requestCompaction() flag for manual /compact.

Changes:
- Agent: add compaction check after plan_end, requestCompaction() method
- SessionController: remove runCompaction(), compactFn, shouldCompact
  check; /compact now calls agent.requestCompaction()
- AgentFactoryResult: remove compact callback (no longer needed)
- Tests: 3 new agent compaction tests, updated controller and
  integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
